meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Scale Your Freelance SaaS Builds Faster
content.seo_description: Break through development plateaus. Learn how to leverage AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship professional-grade SaaS faster.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracing logs and guessing fixes. Use AI-driven debugging to inject diagnostic intent directly into your codebase. By pairing Antigravity’s structural analysis with Claude Code’s execution capabilities, you can identify architectural bottlenecks, resolve complex race conditions, and refactor brittle logic in minutes rather than hours of manual testing.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, the console logs vomit a cascade of red errors, and your client’s deadline is hauntingly close. You’re trapped in the 'Basic App' cycle—building functional but fragile software that breaks the moment it hits production. You aren't just stuck on a bug; you're stuck in a workflow that relies on manual intuition over systematic, AI-accelerated precision.

It’s time to stop treating debugging as a chore and start treating it as a competitive advantage. By integrating AI into your stack, you shift from being a coder who fights bugs to an architect who orchestrates solutions. Let's dismantle the barrier between your current capability and high-end, scalable SaaS delivery.

steps.title: Automated Structural Audit
steps.description: Before fixing, map the failure. Use Antigravity to generate an architectural footprint to isolate where state management is failing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify potential memory leaks or state synchronization issues in the current authentication flow.

steps.title: Context-Aware Error Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the error stack back to the root cause, rather than just patching the immediate symptom.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a diagnostic report for the error stack found in the recent logs, focusing on async chain breaks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --trace-error 'TypeError: Cannot read property of undefined'

steps.title: Refactoring Brittle Logic
steps.description: Transform messy, procedural code into clean, modular, and testable units that are less prone to regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this component to follow the SOLID principles and reduce cyclomatic complexity.

steps.title: Automated Integration Testing
steps.description: Verify your fix isn't breaking peripheral features by generating comprehensive test suites on the fly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of integration tests covering edge cases for the newly refactored payment logic.

steps.title: Production-Grade Verification
steps.description: Perform a final audit to ensure the performance overhead of your fix meets production standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Conduct a performance audit on the refactored code to ensure O(n) complexity where possible.

pro_tips: Always feed Claude Code your 'package.json' and 'tsconfig.json' first to ensure it understands your environment constraints.
Use Antigravity to create 'AI-Agent-Ready' documentation folders; this drastically reduces hallucination rates in complex codebases.
When debugging race conditions, ask the AI to generate a sequence diagram of the async calls before writing any code.
Configure your local environment to pipe logs directly into a temporary file that Claude Code monitors in real-time.
Treat your prompt history as a knowledge base—save successful fix patterns in a local markdown file to reuse across different client projects.
content.next_steps: Once your build is stable, implement a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to automate these AI-driven audits on every pull request.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop burning time on manual debugging and start delivering premium, scalable software. Don't let another deadline turn into a nightmare. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
